title: pyrrosia hastata
intro: Pyrrosia hastata, also known as the Chinese shield fern or hastate shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Pyrrosia hastata has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia hastata are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, Pyrrosia hastata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
